summary: Comprehensive testing completed for HSBC MX Transaction Platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (12/12 tests passed - 100% success rate). All frontend functionality including login, dashboard, transactions management, search/filtering, and transaction detail pages are working correctly. Frontend-backend integration is seamless with proper data flow and real-time updates.
passed_tests: Dashboard stats cards display (Total Transactions, Volume, Successful, Pending/Failed)
Dashboard charts render (Transaction Volume bar chart, Status Distribution pie chart)
Seed Sample Data button creates demo transactions
Navigation between Dashboard and Transactions pages
Transaction Detail/Receipt page displays full SWIFT MX pacs.009.001.08 format
Transaction navigation from dashboard and transactions list
